title: A laundry washing machine comprising a fixing bracket
abstract: The present invention relates to a laundry washing machine (1) which is suitable to be placed on a laundry drying machine (20) having a casing (21) and a plurality of feet (22) fixed to the underside of the casing (21) and supporting the casing (21), and which comprises a body (2) and a top plate (3) which is provided on the body (2) and which at least partially covers the upper part of the body (2).
claims: Claims 1. A laundry washing machine (1), suitable to be placed on a laundry drying machine (20) having a casing (21) and a plurality of feet (22) fixed to the underside of the casing (21) and supporting the casing (21), comprising a body (2) and a top plate (3) which is provided on the body (2) and which at least partially covers the upper part of the body (2), characterized by at least one housing (6) which is provided on the top plate (3); a fixing bracket (7) which has a closed position wherein the fixing bracket (7) covers the housing (6) and an open position wherein the fixing bracket (7) extends from the housing (6) onto the top of the top plate (3) and which is suitable to be fixed to the housing (6) in the open position or in the closed position by means of a fixing member (12); and a holding part (8) which is provided on the fixing bracket (7) and which is configured to at least partially grasp the foot (22) when the fixing bracket (7) is in the open position. 2. A laundry washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the fixing bracket (7) which becomes flush with the top plate (3) when brought to the closed position. 3. A laundry washing machine (1) as in Claim 1 or Claim 2, characterized by at least one support part (11) which is provided on the fixing bracket (7), and a first support (14) which is provided on the housing (6) and against which the support part (11) bears when the fixing bracket (7) is in the open position. 4. A laundry washing machine (1) as in Claim 1 or Claim 3, characterized by a second support (15) which is provided on the housing (6) and against which the support part (11) bears when the fixing bracket (7) is in the closed position. 5. A laundry washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the top plate (3) which has an upper surface (4) and at least two lateral surfaces (5) surrounding the upper surface (4) and extending from the upper surface (4) to the body (2), and at least one housing (6) on each lateral surface (5). 6. A laundry washing machine (1) as in Claim 5, characterized by two housings (6) positioned opposite each other on each lateral surface (5) of the top plate (3). 7. A laundry washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by the holding part (8) has a semicircular recess (9). 8. A laundry washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims, characterized by at least one connection hole (10) which is provided on the fixing bracket (7) and which is positioned so as to be close to the top plate (3) when the fixing bracket (7) is brought to the closed position, and at least one fixing member (12) which is provided on the top plate (3) and which passes through the connection hole (10) and enables the fixing bracket (7) to be fixed to the housing (6). 9. A laundry washing-drying system characterized by a laundry washing machine (1) as in any one of the above claims and a laundry drying machine (20) placed onto the laundry washing machine (1).
